readout_formula.R_W: d M_W / d s = g_2 kappa_h / 2
readout_formula.R_t: d m_t / d s = (y_h kappa_h + y_x kappa_x) / sqrt(2)
readout_formula.closure_condition: orthogonal correction y_x kappa_x/kappa_h = 0 or measured/subtracted
readout_formula.same_source_w_readout: g_2 R_t / (sqrt(2) R_W) = y_h + y_x kappa_x/kappa_h
